final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit D flip-flop with an active-high reset control.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [3:0] d,
    input set_b,
    output reg [3:0] q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (set_b) begin
        q <= d;
    end else begin
        q <= q;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit D flip-flop with an active-high reset control.
